goal: Codify the primitives-first retrieval invariant (grep over live files; no RAG; no persistent maker-side code-graph) in CLAUDE.md + a cited substrate file, cross-linked from /prd

criteria.statement: CLAUDE.md gains a compact primitives-first retrieval invariant (max 6 new lines) naming both rejected classes (embedding/RAG; persistent maker-side code-graph) with a one-line reason each, linking to the substrate file
criteria.verify: Read CLAUDE.md; confirm the invariant names both classes + reasons + link; git diff CLAUDE.md shows at most 6 added lines

criteria.statement: the linked substrate file records the measured asymmetry (grep 0.92 vs graph 0.83 overall; graphs win only structural queries) with the arxiv source URL and its verification tag, plus the Anthropic-abandoned-RAG rationale and the staleness argument
criteria.verify: Read the substrate file; confirm the 0.92/0.83 numbers, arxiv.org/html/2603.27277v1 URL, a [VERIFIED+SRC] tag on the asymmetry, a [REPORTED]-tagged abandoned-RAG claim, and the self-rewriting-maker staleness argument

criteria.statement: the single exception is defined: verifier-only, one-shot graph over the frozen artifact, gated on a measurable pre-condition (demonstrated verifier token-bleed on structural criteria on a specific goal)
criteria.verify: Read the substrate file; confirm the exception scope (verifier-only, one-shot, frozen artifact) and the measurable trigger condition are both stated

criteria.statement: /prd Phase 2 cross-links the invariant so PRD research does not re-propose RAG/graphs for the loop, and the whole change is text-only with no new dependency
criteria.verify: grep .claude/skills/prd/SKILL.md for a reference to the invariant/substrate file in or near Phase 2; git status --porcelain shows only CLAUDE.md, the substrate file, .claude/skills/prd/SKILL.md, and this goal's workdir

banned_outcomes.statement: this goal's criteria.json was modified by the maker
a dependency, hook, or MCP server was added, or CLAUDE.md bloats beyond the 6-line addition
banned_outcomes.verify: git status shows no settings/hook/package files; git diff CLAUDE.md addition count <= 6 lines

banned_outcomes.statement: the invariant misstates the evidence (numbers or tags not matching docs/research/2026-07-08-tooling-augmentation.md)
banned_outcomes.verify: compare the substrate file's numbers/tags against the research report — 0.92/0.83 must be tagged verified, abandoned-RAG must be tagged reported, no invented citations
